creator: lettergrabber@yandex.ru
text:
In my previous post I wrote:

"I tried to start VM without the device passed thru to it- in this case VM started well."

This should be read:

"I tried to REstart VM without the device passed thru to it- in this case VM REstarted well."

And also I forgot to specify my system:

[lanin@freebsd ~]$ uname -abiKp
FreeBSD freebsd 13.1-RELEASE FreeBSD 13.1-RELEASE releng/13.1-n250148-fc952ac2212 GENERIC amd64 amd64 GENERIC 1301000 5b12d97f9629e35915bb91fb9145e851f0b437fe
